characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The main character of the show. An enthusiastic but naive and egotistical 19-year-old American actor fromCleveland,Ohio, who wins a contest to fly to Japan and is hired to play the hero, Kappa Mikey, on the animeLily Mu. Acquired Situational Narcissism: He reinvents his image as "Bad Boy Mikey", so he wil not have to face the fate of winding up in a wimpy kiddy show. He is pretty narcissistic to begin with. Attention Deficit... Ooh, Shiny!: "Two hours? Aw man! But I got such a short attention spa-hey! Look at that bird!" Betty and Veronica: The Archie for Mitsuki's Betty and Lily's Veronica. Big "NO!": Has one when he misses the last copy of a video game at the last second.

characters.name: Mikey Simon
characters.description: The main character of the show. An enthusiastic but naive and egotistical 19-year-old American actor fromCleveland,Ohio, who wins a contest to fly to Japan and is hired to play the hero, Kappa Mikey, on the animeLily Mu. Acquired Situational Narcissism: He reinvents his image as "Bad Boy Mikey", so he wil not have to face the fate of winding up in a wimpy kiddy show. He is pretty narcissistic to begin with. Attention Deficit... Ooh, Shiny!: "Two hours? Aw man! But I got such a short attention spa-hey! Look at that bird!" Betty and Veronica: The Archie for Mitsuki's Betty and Lily's Veronica. Big "NO!": Has one when he misses the last copy of a video game at the last second.

characters.name: Gonard
characters.description: TheCell-like bad guy on-camera, but off-camera, he is just a large, pointy-eared, lovable, oafish moron, and Mikey's best pal. Bag of Holding: His mouth, hair, pockets, hoodie, and butt. Bankruptcy Barrel: He does this during "The Karaoke Episode." Beware the Nice Ones: Because of his naïveté and child-like personality off-camera, he is very easy to upset or anger if you aren't careful, he has gone on a rampage at least once or twice. Beware the Silly Ones: Both on and off camera. On-camera, he is a hammy villain who often chews the scenery. Off-camera, while he's a nice guy most of the time, push him too far, and he'll be almost as vicious as his on-screen persona.

characters.name: Lily
characters.description: Action Girl: OnLilyMu, Lily's character is one of the main heroines and when she is not being aDamsel in Distressshe is a pretty competent fighter. Alpha Bitch: She is definitely the series' most definitive example of one, She always talked smack about her other cast members, especially Mikey. She always called him a spaz in several episodes (especially in Splashomon), getting jealous of his sudden popularity, vice-versa vice-versa. She even went out of her way as to antagonise Mitsuki for having a crush on Mikey in the episode "The Good, The Bad and the Mikey". Even Mikey, who had had a crush on her since the beginning of the show, disliked her bitchiness as the show went on. Betty and Veronica: The Veronica to Mitsuki's Betty for Mikey's Archie. Catchphrase: "Spaz!" (Usually to Mikey) Chickification: In herLilyMushow...and occasionally off it.

characters.name: Mitsuki
characters.description: Action Girl: On and off-camera. She can supposedly crush all ten major arteries of an opponent in under 15 seconds. Betty and Veronica: The Betty to Lily's Veronica for Mikey's Archie. Beware the Nice Ones: Don't you EVER... press any ofMitsuki's buttons! Cannot Spit It Out: UntilThe Musical. The Cutie: She is very warmhearted, even to such characters like her best friend Lily, which is accompannied by her typically soft-spoken voice.

characters.name: Guano
characters.description: Butt-Monkey: Subject to lots of pain and injuries. CatchphraseandVerbal Tic: "GUANO GUANO!" and "CUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUT!". Germans Love David Hasselhoff: Invoked in-universe, the American version of Lilymu wasmacekredto turn Guano into the main character. Interspecies Romance; Guano falls in love with a humanteenagegirl who saw some ofLilyMu. She admitted that she always thought he was a puppet. Parody: Of Pikachu fromPokémon the Series.

characters.name: Ozu
characters.description: Berserk Button:He establishes in the pilot how much hehatescards, especially when used as a concept in media since the trend is so oversaturated. It's the reason (in that episode) why he threatened to canceledLilyMubecause of it unless the cast bring in a unique star, leading to Mikey.Never,evermake pirated copies of one of his games...Ozu:Piracy, willnotbe tolerated! I WILL SHOOT YOU DOWN! I'LL PUNISH YOU! He establishes in the pilot how much hehatescards, especially when used as a concept in media since the trend is so oversaturated. It's the reason (in that episode) why he threatened to canceledLilyMubecause of it unless the cast bring in a unique star, leading to Mikey. Never,evermake pirated copies of one of his games...Ozu:Piracy, willnotbe tolerated! I WILL SHOOT YOU DOWN! I'LL PUNISH YOU! Catchphrase: "You're fired!" Yeah. Cool Old Guy: He knows kung fu, karate, and can negotiate the hell outta' rival companies to get his way.

characters.name: Yes Man
characters.description: Ozu's chimp-faced assistant. Butt-Monkey: Often gets subjugated to a lot of punishment by Ozu, sometimes when he is angry and sometimes when he just feels like. At one point he even gets sent to a foreign country in place of Guano to save face. Though he ends up back in Japan in the next episode withno explanation. Cartoon Physics: Everyone gets these but Yes Man displays it the most with his off the walls animations and insane hijinks like stuffing himself into a briefcase at the airport. Expy: He resembles one of theOsomatsu-kunsextuplets. He even shares some of their wacky eccentricities! Hammerspace: He seems to LIVE by this method.

characters.name: Others
characters.description: Alter Kocker: The Japanese red dragon in "The Man Who Would Be Mikey" has this personality. Crying Indian: The episode "Mikey, Kappa". Expy:There'sDr. Takashi Katashi◊, who's based onKakashi Hatake. He has a similar name, a similar haircut, and he wears his head mirror over his left eye (much like Kakashi does with his forehead protector).The two girl singers in the Battle of the bands episode◊are very similar toAmi & Yumi.Heck you can find a lot of Expies of anime characters in the background.◊ There'sDr. Takashi Katashi◊, who's based onKakashi Hatake. He has a similar name, a similar haircut, and he wears his head mirror over his left eye (much like Kakashi does with his forehead protector). The two girl singers in the Battle of the bands episode◊are very similar toAmi & Yumi.
